httpx\nimport typer\n\nfrom miniq.config import get_settings\n\napp = typer.Typer(no_args_is_help=True, pretty_exceptions_show_locals=REDACTED _base_url() -> str:\n    return get_settings().api_base_url.rstrip(\"/\")\n\n\ndef _parse_payload(payload: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    parsed = json.loads(payload)\n    if not isinstance(parsed, dict):\n        raise typer.BadParameter(\"payload must be a JSON object\")\n    return parsed\n\n\\REDACTED(\"submit\")\ndef submit(\n    task_type: str = typer.Option(..., \"--type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option(\"{}\", \"--payload\"),\n    queue: str = typer.Option(\"default\", \"--queue\"),\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, \"--max-attempts\"),\n    run_at: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--run-at\"),\n    idempotency_key: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--idempotency-key\"),\n) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.post(\n                \"/jobs\",\n                json=REDACTED                    \"type\": task_type,\n                    \"payload\": _parse_payload(payload),\n                    \"queue\": queue,\n                    \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\n                    \"run_at\": run_at,\n                    \"idempotency_key\": idempotency_key,\n                },\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"status\")\ndef status(job_id: str) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"cancel\")\ndef cancel(job_id: str) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"retry\")\ndef retry(job_id: str) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"events-tail\")\ndef events_tail(\n    job_id: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--job-id\"),\n    interval: float = typer.Option(1.0, \"--interval\", min=REDACTED,\n) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        cursor: str | None = None\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED, timeout=REDACTED as client:\n            while True:\n                response = await client.get(\n                    \"/events\",\n                    params=REDACTED\"job_id\": job_id, \"cursor\": cursor, \"limit\": 100},\n                )\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                payload = response.json()\n                for event in payload[\"items\"]:\n                    typer.echo(json.dumps(event, indent=REDACTED                cursor = payload.get(\"next_cursor\") or cursor\n                await asyncio.sleep(interval)\n\n    try:\n        asyncio.run(_run())\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        return\n\n\ndef _percentile(values: list[float], percentile: float) -> float:\n    if not values:\n        return 0.0\n    ordered = sorted(values)\n    index = max(0, min(len(ordered) - 1, round((percentile / 100) * (len(ordered) - 1))))\n    return ordered[index]\n\n\\REDACTED(\"loadtest\")\ndef loadtest(\n    jobs: int = typer.Option(100, \"--jobs\", min=REDACTED,\n    concurrency: int = typer.Option(20, \"--concurrency\", min=REDACTED,\n    task_type: str = typer.Option(\"sleep\", \"--type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option('{\"seconds\":0.05}', \"--payload\"),\n) -> None:\n    async def _submit_one(\n        client: httpx.AsyncClient, payload_obj: dict[str, Any]\n    ) -> tuple[str, float]:\n        start = time.perf_counter()\n        response = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=REDACTED\"type\": task_type, \"payload\": payload_obj})\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        return response.json()[\"job_id\"], time.perf_counter() - start\n\n    async def _wait_for_terminal(client: httpx.AsyncClient, job_id: str) -> float:\n        start = time.perf_counter()\n        while True:\n            response = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            if response.json()[\"state\"] in {\"SUCCEEDED\", \"FAILED\", \"CANCELED\", \"DEAD\"}:\n                return time.perf_counter() - start\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.05)\n\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        parsed_payload = _parse_payload(payload)\n        semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrency)\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED, timeout=REDACTED as client:\n\n            async def submit_with_limit() -> tuple[str, float]:\n                async with semaphore:\n                    return await _submit_one(client, parsed_payload)\n\n            submitted = await asyncio.gather(*(submit_with_limit() for _ in range(jobs)))\n            completion_latencies = await asyncio.gather(\n                *(_wait_for_terminal(client, job_id) for job_id, _ in submitted)\n            )\n        submit_latencies = [latency for _, latency in submitted]\n        summary = {\n            \"jobs\": jobs,\n            \"submit_avg_seconds\": statistics.fmean(submit_latencies),\n            \"submit_p50_seconds\": _percentile(submit_latencies, 50),\n            \"submit_p95_seconds\": _percentile(submit_latencies, 95),\n            \"submit_p99_seconds\": _percentile(submit_latencies, 99),\n            \"completion_avg_seconds\": statistics.fmean(completion_latencies),\n            \"completion_p50_seconds\": _percentile(completion_latencies, 50),\n            \"completion_p95_seconds\": _percentile(completion_latencies, 95),\n            \"completion_p99_seconds\": _percentile(completion_latencies, 99),\n            \"timestamp\": datetime.now(tz=REDACTED,\n        }\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(summary, indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    app()\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport logging\nimport os\nimport time\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import timedelta\n\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\n\nfrom miniq.broker.redis import StreamMessage\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import get_logger\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import (\n    job_duration_seconds,\n    jobs_finished_total,\n    jobs_started_total,\n    worker_reclaims_total,\n)\nfrom miniq.retry import calculate_retry_delay\nfrom miniq.runtime import Runtime, build_runtime\nfrom miniq.tasks.base import TaskContext, TaskDefinition\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=REDACTED WorkerService:\n    runtime: Runtime\n    logger: logging.LoggerAdapter[logging.Logger]\n    _consumer_name: str = field(init=REDACTED    def __post_init__(self) -> None:\n        self._consumer_name = f\"worker-{os.getpid()}\"\n\n    async def run(self) -> None:\n        for queue in self.runtime.settings.queue_names:\n            await self.runtime.broker.ensure_group(queue)\n        start_http_server(self.runtime.settings.worker_metrics_port)\n        self.logger.info(\"worker starting\", extra=REDACTED\"consumer\": self._consumer_name})\n        consumers = [\n            asyncio.create_task(self._consume_loop(slot))\n            for slot in range(self.runtime.settings.worker_concurrency)\n        ]\n        reclaimer = asyncio.create_task(self._reclaim_loop())\n        try:\n            await asyncio.gather(*consumers, reclaimer)\n        finally:\n            for task in consumers:\n                task.cancel()\n            reclaimer.cancel()\n            await asyncio.gather(*consumers, reclaimer, return_exceptions=REDACTED    async def _consume_loop(self, slot: int) -> None:\n        while True:\n            try:\n                messages = await self.runtime.broker.read_group(\n                    queues=REDACTED,\n                    consumer_name=REDACTED,\n                    count=REDACTED,\n                    block_ms=REDACTED,\n                )\n                for message in messages:\n                    await self._handle_message(message=REDACTED, source=REDACTED\"consumer-{slot}\")\n            except asyncio.CancelledError:\n                raise\n            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n                self.logger.exception(\"worker loop failed\", extra=REDACTED\"consumer\": self._consumer_name})\n                await asyncio.sleep(1.0)\n\n    async def _reclaim_loop(self) -> None:\n        while True:\n            try:\n                await asyncio.sleep(self.runtime.settings.worker_reclaim_interval_seconds)\n                messages = await self.runtime.broker.reclaim(\n                    queues=REDACTED,\n                    consumer_name=REDACTED,\n                    min_idle_time_ms=REDACTED,\n                    count=REDACTED,\n                )\n                if messages:\n                    worker_reclaims_total.inc(len(messages))\n                for message in messages:\n                    await self._handle_message(message=REDACTED, source=REDACTED\"reclaimer\")\n            except asyncio.CancelledError:\n                raise\n            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n                self.logger.exception(\n                    \"worker reclaim loop failed\", extra=REDACTED\"consumer\": self._consumer_name}\n                )\n\n    async def _handle_message(self, *, message: StreamMessage, source: str) -> None:\n        job_id = message.values.get(\"job_id\")\n        if job_id is None:\n            await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED            return\n        current = await self.runtime.repository.get_job(job_id)\n        if current is None:\n            await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED            return\n        claimed = await self.runtime.repository.claim_for_execution(\n            job_id=REDACTED,\n            stream_id=REDACTED,\n            consumer=REDACTED,\n        )\n        if claimed is None:\n            current = await self.runtime.repository.get_job(job_id)\n            if current is None:\n                await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED                return\n            await self._handle_non_claimed(message=REDACTED, current=REDACTED            return\n        await self._execute_job(job=REDACTED, message=REDACTED, source=REDACTED    async def _handle_non_claimed(self, *, message: StreamMessage, current: Job) -> None:\n        if current.state == JobState.DEAD.value and current.dlq_published_at is None:\n            await self.runtime.broker.publish_dlq(\n                job_id=REDACTED,\n                queue=REDACTED,\n                job_type=REDACTED,\n                reason=REDACTED or \"dead job\",\n            )\n            await self.runtime.repository.mark_dlq_published(job_id=REDACTED        if current.state != JobState.QUEUED.value:\n            await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED    async def _execute_job(self, *, job: Job, message: StreamMessage, source: str) -> None:\n        try:\n            definition = self.runtime.tasks.get(job.type)\n        except KeyError:\n            await self.runtime.repository.mark_dead(\n                job_id=REDACTED,\n                error_message=REDACTED\"UnknownTaskError: unknown task type {job.type}\",\n            )\n            await self.runtime.broker.publish_dlq(\n                job_id=REDACTED,\n                queue=REDACTED,\n                job_type=REDACTED,\n                reason=REDACTED\"unknown task type: {job.type}\",\n            )\n            await self.runtime.repository.mark_dlq_published(job_id=REDACTED            await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED            return\n        jobs_started_total.labels(type=REDACTED        started_at = time.perf_counter()\n        context = TaskContext(\n            job_id=REDACTED,\n            job_type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            attempt=REDACTED,\n            logger=REDACTED,\n            is_cancel_requested=REDACTED self.runtime.repository.is_cancel_requested(job_id=REDACTED,\n        )\n        self.logger.info(\n            \"job execution started\",\n            extra=REDACTED                \"job_id\": job.id,\n                \"stream_id\": message.stream_id,\n                \"consumer\": self._consumer_name,\n                \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                \"state\": job.state,\n                \"queue\": job.queue,\n            },\n        )\n        try:\n            result = await self.runtime.tasks.run(job.type, job.payload, context)\n        except asyncio.CancelledError as exc:\n            await self.runtime.repository.mark_running_canceled(job_id=REDACTED, message=REDACTED            jobs_finished_total.labels(type=REDACTED, state=REDACTED            job_duration_seconds.labels(type=REDACTED - started_at)\n            await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED            return\n        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001\n            await self._handle_failure(\n                job=REDACTED,\n                definition=REDACTED,\n                message=REDACTED,\n                error=REDACTED,\n                started_at=REDACTED,\n            )\n            return\n        await self.runtime.repository.complete_job(job_id=REDACTED, result_payload=REDACTED        jobs_finished_total.labels(type=REDACTED, state=REDACTED        job_duration_seconds.labels(type=REDACTED - started_at)\n        await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED        self.logger.info(\n            \"job execution succeeded\",\n            extra=REDACTED                \"job_id\": job.id,\n                \"stream_id\": message.stream_id,\n                \"consumer\": self._consumer_name,\n                \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                \"state\": JobState.SUCCEEDED.value,\n                \"queue\": job.queue,\n                \"source\": source,\n            },\n        )\n\n    async def _handle_failure(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job: Job,\n        definition: TaskDefinition,\n        message: StreamMessage,\n        error: Exception,\n        started_at: float,\n    ) -> None:\n        error_message = f\"{type(error).__name__}: {error}\"\n        if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\n            await self.runtime.repository.mark_dead(job_id=REDACTED, error_message=REDACTED            await self.runtime.broker.publish_dlq(\n                job_id=REDACTED,\n                queue=REDACTED,\n                job_type=REDACTED,\n                reason=REDACTED,\n            )\n            await self.runtime.repository.mark_dlq_published(job_id=REDACTED            jobs_finished_total.labels(type=REDACTED, state=REDACTED            job_duration_seconds.labels(type=REDACTED - started_at)\n            await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED            return\n        delay = calculate_retry_delay(\n            job_id=REDACTED,\n            attempt=REDACTED,\n            policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n        next_run_at = utc_now() + timedelta(seconds=REDACTED        await self.runtime.repository.fail_and_requeue(\n            job_id=REDACTED,\n            error_message=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n        )\n        jobs_finished_total.labels(type=REDACTED, state=REDACTED        job_duration_seconds.labels(type=REDACTED - started_at)\n        await self.runtime.broker.ack(queue=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED def run_worker(runtime: Runtime | None = None) -> None:\n    resolved_runtime = runtime or build_runtime(service=REDACTED\"worker\")\n    await resolved_runtime.initialize()\n    try:\n        worker = WorkerService(\n            runtime=REDACTED,\n            logger=REDACTED\"miniq.worker\", service=REDACTED\"worker\"),\n        )\n        await worker.run()\n    finally:\n        await resolved_runtime.close()\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    try:\n        asyncio.run(run_worker())\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        return\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport logging\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\n\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import get_logger\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import scheduler_enqueues_total\nfrom miniq.runtime import Runtime, build_runtime\nfrom miniq.scheduler.config import ScheduleConfig, ScheduleDefinition, load_schedule_config\nfrom miniq.services import JobService\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=REDACTED SchedulerService:\n    runtime: Runtime\n    logger: logging.LoggerAdapter[logging.Logger]\n    job_service: JobService\n    _startup_time: datetime = field(init=REDACTED    _schedule_config: ScheduleConfig = field(init=REDACTED    def __post_init__(self) -> None:\n        self._startup_time = utc_now()\n        self._schedule_config = load_schedule_config(self.runtime.settings.scheduler_config_path)\n        for schedule in self._schedule_config.schedules:\n            if schedule.type not in self.runtime.tasks.names:\n                msg = f\"unknown scheduled task type: {schedule.type}\"\n                raise ValueError(msg)\n            self.runtime.tasks.validate_payload(schedule.type, schedule.payload)\n\n    async def run(self) -> None:\n        start_http_server(self.runtime.settings.scheduler_metrics_port)\n        self.logger.info(\"scheduler starting\")\n        while True:\n            try:\n                await self.job_service.reconcile_due_jobs(\n                    limit=REDACTED                )\n                await self._emit_due_schedule_jobs()\n                await asyncio.sleep(self.runtime.settings.scheduler_interval_seconds)\n            except asyncio.CancelledError:\n                raise\n            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n                self.logger.exception(\"scheduler loop failed\")\n                await asyncio.sleep(1.0)\n\n    async def _emit_due_schedule_jobs(self) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        for schedule in self._schedule_config.schedules:\n            for planned_time in await self._due_ticks(schedule, now=REDACTED                job = await self.runtime.repository.create_schedule_job(\n                    schedule_id=REDACTED,\n                    schedule=REDACTED,\n                    planned_time=REDACTED,\n                    queue=REDACTED,\n                    job_type=REDACTED,\n                    payload=REDACTED,\n                    max_attempts=REDACTED,\n                )\n                if job is None:\n                    continue\n                scheduler_enqueues_total.labels(schedule_id=REDACTED                await self.job_service.try_enqueue(job)\n                self.logger.info(\n                    \"scheduled job emitted\",\n                    extra=REDACTED                        \"schedule_id\": schedule.id,\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\n                    },\n                )\n\n    async def _due_ticks(self, schedule: ScheduleDefinition, *, now: datetime) -> list[datetime]:\n        last_tick = await self.runtime.repository.get_last_schedule_tick(schedule_id=REDACTED        base = self._startup_time if last_tick is None else last_tick\n        next_tick = schedule.next_after(base)\n        due: list[datetime] = []\n        while next_tick <= now:\n            due.append(next_tick)\n            next_tick = schedule.next_after(next_tick)\n        return due\n\n\nasync def run_scheduler(runtime: Runtime | None = None) -> None:\n    resolved_runtime = runtime or build_runtime(service=REDACTED\"scheduler\")\n    await resolved_runtime.initialize()\n    try:\n        logger = get_logger(\"miniq.scheduler\", service=REDACTED\"scheduler\")\n        job_service = JobService(\n            repository=REDACTED,\n            broker=REDACTED,\n            tasks=REDACTED,\n            logger=REDACTED,\n        )\n        scheduler = SchedulerService(\n            runtime=REDACTED,\n            logger=REDACTED,\n            job_service=REDACTED,\n        )\n        await scheduler.run()\n    finally:\n        await resolved_runtime.close()\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    try:\n        asyncio.run(run_scheduler())\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        return\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Any, cast\n\nimport yaml\nfrom croniter import croniter  # type: ignore[import-untyped]\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\n\n\nclass ScheduleDefinition(BaseModel):\n    id: str\n    cron: str\n    queue: str = \"default\"\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    max_attempts: int = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    def next_after(self, base: datetime) -> datetime:\n        return cast(datetime, croniter(self.cron, base).get_next(datetime))\n\n\nclass ScheduleConfig(BaseModel):\n    schedules: list[ScheduleDefinition] = Field(default_factory=REDACTED load_schedule_config(path: Path) -> ScheduleConfig:\n    if not path.exists():\n        return ScheduleConfig()\n    raw = path.read_text(encoding=REDACTED\"utf-8\")\n    data: dict[str, Any]\n    if path.suffix.lower() == \".json\":\n        data = json.loads(raw)\n    else:\n        parsed = yaml.safe_load(raw)\n        data = {} if parsed is None else parsed\n    return ScheduleConfig.model_validate(data)\n"
